_doc: Lumo 3D Asset Manifest. AssetLoader liest hier ID->Pfad. Fehlende Dateien sind OK - AssetLoader liefert Magenta-Placeholder + WARN. _fetch_prompts ist optionale Info fuer tools/fetch_assets.py (Meshy/Replicate).

lumo_fox.prompt: low-poly friendly cartoon fox mascot, warm orange fur, big eyes, soft style, t-pose, single GLB

hub_island.prompt: low-poly floating magical island base, warm tones, soft glow edges, single GLB

portal_learn.prompt: low-poly magical portal ring, warm gold color, glowing emissive, simple torus form

portal_games.prompt: low-poly magical portal ring, turquoise color, glowing emissive, simple torus form

portal_parent.prompt: low-poly magical portal ring, soft violet color, glowing emissive, simple torus form

star_collectible.prompt: low-poly 5-pointed star, golden warm color, emissive yellow center
